title: Take That - Greatest Hits Live (Concert)
original_title: Take That: Odyssey - Greatest Hits Live
overview: Celebrating 30 incredible years in music, Take That's Greatest Hits Live Tour of 2019 represents a fitting climax to the second chapter of their astonishing life in pop. Filmed at Cardiff's Principality Stadium on the last UK date of the tour, this spectacular production is nothing short of what you'd expect from the masters of stadium pop performance.
